title: Compatibility fixed baseline and latest probe separation

sources.reason: Current compatibility workflow marks non-Python lanes continue-on-error and excludes them from the blocking gate.
Release documentation defines compatibility evidence used by the publication decision.
Regression coverage for blocking baseline and exploratory probe separation.

problemStatement: Compatibility documentation claims verified stacks while the release gate only blocks on ShellCheck and Python; non-Python failures can be green through continue-on-error.

riskAssessment.reason: Changing release-blocking CI can reject previously accepted commits, so fixed versions and exploratory behavior must be explicit.

executionDecision.reason: The approved review defines the blocking-baseline and latest-probe split.

preReviewWarnings: Review focus: verify every lane labeled verified is a required dependency of compatibility-gate, while exploratory probes remain explicitly non-blocking.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Blocking baseline lanes use explicit toolchain versions and every stack described as verified is required by compatibility-gate.
Latest ecosystem probes are separate, explicitly exploratory, and their failures do not falsely report verified baseline support.
Workflow regression tests assert the gate dependencies and documentation distinguishes verified baseline from hosted probe evidence.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The current compatibility workflow can report success while verified non-Python stacks fail, which makes release support claims stronger than their blocking evidence.
constraints: Keep stable/latest probes visible as exploratory evidence.
Use explicit fixed versions for blocking baseline lanes.
Do not silently relabel a non-blocking lane as verified.
intent.rationale: Release claims must be calibrated to the actual gate that can fail.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A failure in every verified compatibility lane blocks compatibility-gate
scenarioCoverage.reason: Verify with workflow assertions and CI.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Latest probe failure remains visible without blocking the baseline gate
scenarioCoverage.reason: Verify with workflow structure and documentation checks.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized automated execution of the review remediation plan.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
